notes: FLUSH MOUNTED INSTALLATION WITH MANUALLY COVERED ROLLING JACK LOWERING POCKET
MOST OFTEN USED FOR FLEET MAINTENANCE APPLICATIONS WITH MODERATE RATIO OF TIRE, WHEEL OR BRAKE SERVICES
GRATING RECOMMENDED TO COVER ROLLING JACK POCKET
MANUALLY LOCATED FOR EACH USE OF LIFT
CONCRETE REINFORCEMENT SIZES SHALL REACH FULL 28 DAY F'c STRENGTH
LIFT UNIT TRANSLATES TO FRONT FOR FRONT LOWERING, ALLOW APPROXIMATELY 60 INCHES AT REAR
ALL FLOOR REQUIREMENTS BASED ON CONCRETE SLAB ON GRADE
USE SMOOTH ELECTRICAL 90's IN CONDUITS, NOT PLUMBING 90's

pages_summary.description: General notes page with comprehensive installation requirements and specifications
pages_summary.extracted_text: GENERAL NOTES, FLUSH LIFTS ONLY, NOTE 1: CONCRETE USED FOR BASE AND SIDE WALLS f'c=4,000 psi RECOMMENDED, NOTE 2: CONCRETE FULL 28 DAY f'c STRENGTH BEFORE ANCHOR INSTALLATION, NOTE 3: CONCRETE REINFORCEMENT SIZES, NOTE 4: CONCRETE REINFORCEMENT SPECIFICATIONS FOR FLOOR AREA, NOTE 5: REINFORCING STEEL NOT TO INTERFERE WITH ANCHOR BOLTS, NOTE 6: FASTENING SYSTEMS AND ANCHOR BOLTS, NOTE 7: CARE FOR PARALLEL AND STRAIGHT TRENCH WALLS, NOTE 8: SLOPE BOTTOM OF TRENCH 1/16 INCH PER FOOT, NOTE 9: MAXIMUM ONE INCH ADJUSTMENT FOR LEVELING, NOTE 10: SHIM LEVELING WHERE MORE THAN 3/4 INCH, NOTE 11: NO EMBEDDED PLUMBING WITHIN 16 INCHES OF ANCHOR BOLTS, NOTE 12: PROVIDE 4 INCH SCH 40 PVC PIPE AS HYDRAULIC-PNEUMATIC SERVICE SUPPLY, NOTE 13: PROVIDE 1 INCH SCH 40 STEEL CONDUITS AS ELECTRICAL SERVICE SUPPLY, NOTE 14: ONE 4 INCH SCH 40 PVC DRAIN PIPE TO CARRY DRAINAGE, NOTE 15: PROVIDE TEMPORARY CAPS FOR ALL CONDUITS, NOTE 16: CONTROL CONSOLE MUST BE LOCATED IN VICINITY OF LIFT, NOTE 17: LIFT UNIT REQUIRES CLEAN DRY COMPRESSED AIR, NOTE 18: PROVIDE ONE 1 INCH SCH 40 RIGID STEEL CONDUIT AS COMPRESSED AIR SUPPLY, NOTE 19: LIFT UNIT REQUIRES HIGH VOLTAGE POWER SOURCE, NOTE 20: PROVIDE ONE 1 INCH SCH 40 RIGID STEEL CONDUIT AS ELECTRICAL SERVICE SUPPLY, NOTE 21: ALL FLOOR REQUIREMENTS BASED ON CONCRETE SLAB ON GRADE
